name: Community Bank Delaware
description_short: Community Bank Delaware is a regional bank serving Sussex County with $430M+ in assets, offering business and consumer banking products since 2006.
description_long:
Community Bank Delaware was founded in July 2006 by a group of local business owners and women with the goal of serving the financial needs of their community. Over nearly two decades, the institution has grown to manage over $430 million in assets as of December 31, 2025, and maintains a governance structure of a 9-member Board of Directors. The bank operates as a traditional full-service financial institution focused on regional presence and community integration.

The bank offers standard business and consumer banking products, including online banking access, checking and savings accounts, and various lending services. While the website provides limited detail on specific product offerings, they maintain multiple physical locations throughout Sussex County with published hours, suggesting a branch-based retail banking model. Customers can access online banking services and contact the bank through their website for additional information about specific products.

Community Bank Delaware distinguishes itself through an explicit commitment to community reinvestment, with a stated mission to donate a percentage of net income to charities and those in need within Sussex County. The bank emphasizes maintaining a local, personalized banking experience with "caring, capable banking professionals" and maintains security awareness by prominently warning customers about call spoofing scams and credential theft attempts—a reflection of their customer-protection focus.

As a regional community bank, Community Bank Delaware serves customers primarily in Sussex County, Delaware. The website lacks detailed information about specific loan products, interest rates, fee structures, and other technical banking details that would allow for comprehensive product comparison. Prospective customers should contact the bank directly or visit a physical location for detailed information about account types, lending terms, and service offerings. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: Strong local presence with multiple locations throughout Sussex County with published hours
Substantial asset base of $430M+ demonstrates financial stability and capacity
Explicit commitment to community reinvestment through charitable donations from net income
Online banking access available for digital-first customers
Active security awareness with prominent scam alerts protecting customers from fraud
Nearly 20 years of established operations showing longevity and community trust
9-member Board of Directors governance structure providing institutional oversight
cons: Website provides minimal detail about specific products, rates, and fees—customers must contact directly
Limited to Sussex County service area, restricting accessibility for customers outside the region
No information about mobile banking app availability or digital service capabilities
No details on business loan products, SBA lending, or commercial banking specifics despite claiming business banking services
best_for: Sussex County, Delaware residents and businesses seeking local banking relationships
Customers who prioritize community-focused institutions with reinvestment in local charities
Small business owners in the region looking for relationship-based commercial banking
diagnosis: Community Bank Delaware is best suited for residents and business owners in Sussex County, Delaware who value local banking relationships and community reinvestment. The primary caveat is the limited online information about specific products and services—prospective customers must contact the bank directly or visit a branch to understand detailed offerings, rates, fees, and eligibility requirements.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
